headline: United Rentals (URI) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Matthew Flannery: Thank you, operator, and good morning, everyone.  This translates to working hand-in-hand with our customers to provide an unmatched experience across our one-stop shop of gen rent and specialty products, coupled with industry-leading technology and a world-class team.  Ultimately, this all culminates in our value proposition, which not only improves the customers' productivity and efficiency, but also positions us to outperform the market.

headline: Does United Rentals Stock Qualify As A Top-Tier Capital Compounder?
summary: United Rentals (URI) has grown net income at a 6% average clip over the past three years. Yet earnings per share have expanded by a much faster 9.3% over the same period.

headline: Snowflake Expands Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Code to Power the Control Plane for the Agentic Enterprise
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., April 21, 2026--Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW), the AI Data Cloud company, today announced significant updates across Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Code, advancing its vision to become the control plane for the agentic enterprise. As AI systems evolve from answering questions to taking action, these enhancements enable organizations to connect even more data sources, enterprise systems, and AI models with their trusted Snowflake data within a unified experience.
